response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software development and distributed systems, with experience in leadership and mentoring through workshops and team contributions. However, his experience with C++ (5+ years) and large-scale infrastructure (3+ years) does not fully meet the minimum 8 years in C++ and 5 years in infrastructure required for this role. His expertise leans more toward web and mobile development, with limited evidence of deep cloud architecture or compute infrastructure experience.
strengths: Extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms (C++, JavaScript, Dlang, etc.)
Proven leadership and mentoring through workshops, talks, and team contributions
Demonstrated ability to work on large-scale projects and optimize performance in high-traffic environments
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (appears to be ~5 years, not meeting the 8-year minimum requirement)
Limited direct experience with cloud architecture and compute infrastructure (preferred qualification, not minimum)
Lacks production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs (preferred qualification)
